resources.string: Persistent control for keeping the app active while the user wants the screen awake.
Display-on behavior is best effort and may still be limited by Android or OEM firmware
The widget and Quick Settings tile are still the primary controls. This screen exists so the app can launch normally and expose battery-optimization help.
Overlay fallback: enabled and permission granted. A tiny keep-screen-on overlay will appear during active sessions.
Overlay fallback: enabled, but overlay permission is still missing.
Overlay fallback: off. Enable it for the strongest public-API cross-app fallback.
